blended.narrative: Le Massif is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,409 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
